title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: ca-certificates bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for ca-certificates is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The ca-certificates package contains a set of Certificate Authority (CA) certificates chosen by the Mozilla Foundation for use with the Internet Public Key Infrastructure (PKI).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111754)  ca-certificates needs a license correction (JIRA:RHEL-54380)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for ca-certificates is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The ca-certificates package contains a set of Certificate Authority (CA) certificates chosen by the Mozilla Foundation for use with the Internet Public Key Infrastructure (PKI).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111754)  ca-certificates needs a license correction (JIRA:RHEL-54380)
